ops.text:
INTERIM (fast deterministic checks, own code, all independent of E15's draws):

AUC reproduced EXACT from raw probs+labels: 0.9316896744944222 == meta.auc.

Analytic SE (my own HM + DeLong impl on raw labels/scores):
- Hanley-McNeil n=628 = 0.010286659998 == target 0.01028665999769205
- DeLong n=628 = 0.009981676032 == target 0.009981676031609831
- Hanley-McNeil n=1325 = 0.006612837004 == target 0.006612837004067934

Totals + MDE (formula applied to SE components):
- se_tot628 additive = 0.011431681169 == 0.011431681169389578
- se_tot1325 additive = 0.007636734787 == 0.00763673478727837
- z-sum = 2.801585218113 == 2.8015852181129683
- MDE n628 unpaired 0.045292775907 (card 0.0453); n1325 0.030257047258 (card 0.0303); rho0.9 0.014322833342 (card 0.0143); rho0.99 0.004529277591 (card 0.0045). ALL match.
- rho needed for delta 0.0009 = 0.999605 (card 0.9996); delta/MDE = 0.0199 (card). match.

Votes (fully independent from votes_rep1..5 + sample.json):
- pooled pos->noise flip = 39/220 = 0.17727272727 == 0.177
- per-category raw: direction 0, premature 0, style_violation 0.05, wrong_approach 0.10, unwanted_action 0.40, incorrect_change 0.657143 (card 0.66). match.
- frac not-unanimous 9/72 = 0.125; mean pairwise disagreement 0.0583333 (card 0.058). match.
- Fleiss is_steering 0.8778912004 (card 0.878); Fleiss category 0.8488924193 (card 0.849); mean pairwise Cohen is_steering 0.8787150124 (card 0.879). ALL match to full precision.

Stored bootstrap/MC draws (boot_*.npy, mc_*.npy, len=2000 each) std_ddof1 == reported SE to <1e-6 for all 7 arrays.

Reconstructed shrinkage rule from votes: shrunk = (n_flip + pooled*K)/(n_votes+K), K=5 exactly reproduces E15's per-category shrunk table. Remaining: independent bootstrap/MC regeneration (fresh seed 8675309, B=20000) to confirm the draws themselves, not just their summaries — running now.
